name: Baklava
description: Layers of flaky filo filled with chopped pistachios and walnuts, sweetened with rosewater syrup.

specs.ingredients: Filo dough, pistachios, walnuts, sugar, rosewater, butter

name: Kunafa
description: Shredded phyllo pastry layered with sweet cheese and soaked in orange-blossom syrup.

specs.ingredients: Kataifi dough, akkawi cheese, sugar, orange blossom water, pistachios

name: Pita Bread
description: Soft, round flatbread with a pocket, perfect for sandwiches or dipping.

specs.ingredients: Wheat flour, water, yeast, salt

name: Manakish Za'atar
description: Traditional Middle Eastern flatbread topped with za'atar spice mix and olive oil.

specs.ingredients: Dough, za'atar (thyme, sesame, sumac), olive oil

name: Ka'ak (Sesame Bread Rings)
description: Crispy sesame bread rings, often enjoyed with cheese or labneh.

specs.ingredients: Flour, sesame seeds, yeast, salt, olive oil

name: Ma'amoul (Date-Filled Cookies)
description: Semolina shortbread cookies filled with date paste, dusted with powdered sugar.

specs.ingredients: Semolina, butter, dates, cinnamon, powdered sugar
specs.variants: Also available with pistachios or walnuts

name: Basbousa
description: Moist semolina cake soaked in simple syrup, often topped with coconut or almonds.

specs.ingredients: Semolina, yogurt, sugar, coconut, almonds, syrup

name: Qatayef
description: Stuffed pancakes filled with sweet cheese or nuts, fried and dipped in syrup.

specs.ingredients: Flour, yeast, sugar, akkawi cheese, walnuts, syrup

name: Sfiha (Meat Pies)
description: Open-faced pastries topped with spiced minced lamb or beef.

specs.ingredients: Dough, minced meat, onions, pine nuts, pomegranate molasses, spices

name: Fatayer Spinach
description: Triangular pastries filled with spinach, sumac, and onions.

specs.ingredients: Flour, spinach, onions, sumac, olive oil, lemon juice

name: Halawet el Jibn
description: Sweet cheese rolls with cream filling, topped with pistachios and syrup.

specs.ingredients: Akkaawi cheese, semolina, sugar, cream, pistachios, rose syrup

name: Warbat with Cream
description: Flaky phyllo pastry filled with creamy custard and drizzled with syrup.

specs.ingredients: Phyllo dough, semolina custard, sugar, orange blossom syrup

name: Croissant
description: Buttery, flaky French croissant with a golden crust.

specs.ingredients: Flour, butter, yeast, sugar, salt

name: Baguette
description: Classic French baguette with a crisp crust and soft interior.

specs.ingredients: Flour, water, yeast, salt

name: Chocolate Chip Cookie
description: Chewy cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chips.

specs.ingredients: Flour, butter, brown sugar, chocolate chips, eggs, vanilla

name: Cinnamon Roll
description: Soft rolled pastry with cinnamon sugar and cream cheese frosting.

specs.ingredients: Flour, butter, cinnamon, brown sugar, cream cheese, powdered sugar

name: New York Cheesecake
description: Rich and creamy cheesecake with a graham cracker crust.

specs.ingredients: Cream cheese, sugar, eggs, graham crackers, butter, vanilla

name: Glazed Donut
description: Classic yeast donut with a sweet glaze finish.

specs.ingredients: Flour, sugar, yeast, eggs, milk, glaze
specs.variants: Also available in chocolate and sprinkles

name: Blueberry Muffin
description: Moist muffin bursting with fresh blueberries.

specs.ingredients: Flour, sugar, butter, eggs, blueberries, milk

name: Scone with Currants
description: Buttery British scone studded with dried currants, perfect with clotted cream.

specs.ingredients: Flour, butter, currants, sugar, milk, eggs

name: Plain Bagel
description: Chewy, boiled bagel with a golden crust.

specs.ingredients: Flour, water, yeast, malt syrup, salt

name: Soft Pretzel
description: Soft, chewy pretzel sprinkled with coarse salt, served warm.

specs.ingredients: Flour, water, yeast, butter, baking soda, salt
specs.dip: Great with mustard or cheese sauce

name: Danish Pastry (Raspberry)
description: Flaky, buttery Danish filled with raspberry jam and topped with icing.

specs.ingredients: Flour, butter, raspberry jam, sugar, eggs, cream cheese
specs.variants: Also available with apricot or cheese

name: Chocolate Eclair
description: Choux pastry filled with vanilla custard and topped with chocolate glaze.

specs.ingredients: Flour, butter, eggs, milk, sugar, chocolate, vanilla

name: French Macarons (Box of 6)
description: Assorted delicate almond meringue cookies with ganache fillings.

specs.ingredients: Almond flour, egg whites, sugar, buttercream, ganache
specs.flavors: Pistachio, raspberry, chocolate, lemon, vanilla, coffee
